title: Sealapack Press & Seal Essential Food & Freezer Bags, Pack of 60 Bags
features: EASY CLOSE: Sealapack Food & Freezer bags have a simple, quick press and seal closing system. Just add food, leftovers, prepared vegetables or sauces, press to securely seal and store as required

EFFICIENT STORAGE, REDUCE FOOD WASTE: Freezers are often under used, make the most of these bags and reduce food waste, chop and freeze overripe fruit to quickly make a smoothie or fruit compote. Wash, chop and store excess vegetables and fresh herbs. Freeze leftovers and sauces once cooled
BULK BUY: Larger pack sizes of fresh meat, or fish can easily be separated into portions in each bag, seal and freezer.
TIME SAVING: Add a marinade to fish or meat, tumble chopped vegetables in herbs, seal and freeze to save time prep for future meals
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: BOX OF 60 BAGS
description: Product Description Sealapack Food & Freezer bags have a simple, quick press and seal closing system. Just add food, leftovers, prepared vegetables or sauces, press to securely seal and store as required. Freezers are often under used, make the most of these bags and reduce food waste, chop and freeze overripe fruit to quickly make a smoothie or fruit compote. Wash, chop and store excess vegetables and fresh herbs. Freeze leftovers and sauces once cooled. Larger pack sizes of fresh meat, or fish can easily be separated into portions in each bag, seal and freezer. Add a marinade to fish or meat, tumble chopped vegetables in herbs, seal and freeze to save time prep for future meals. Box of 60 bags Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, Manchester M4 6AF
